strengths: 15+ years across full-stack, with recent TypeScript/Node.js and React work at re:cinq and Optilyz
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active community teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is older (robotic arms, mobile orchestration)
Cloud breadth limited — AWS CDK mentioned, but no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production depth beyond GISCollective
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer well beyond the 6-year bar, with directly relevant recent work in TypeScript/Node.js, React, and AI agent tooling, plus a strong track record in testing and engineering practices. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are present but look bridgeable given the breadth of languages and frameworks already demonstrated.
